testCases.name: test_case_0
testCases.input: What are the symptoms of overwatering in aloe vera?
testCases.actualOutput:
Overwatering is the most common cause of damage to Aloe Vera plants, leading to several distinct symptoms that indicate the plant is suffering from too much moisture.

Symptoms of overwatering in Aloe Vera include:
- Soft, mushy, see-through leaves
- Brown/black base
- Bad smell
- Rotten roots
testCases.expectedOutput: Soft, mushy, see-through leaves. Brown/black base. Bad smell. Rotten roots.
